name: Medium Decorative Basket - Green - Cloud Island™
description:
Store your baby's belongings in sweet style with this Medium Decorative Basket from cloud island™. This decorative storage basket features a green and cream woven construction adorned with circular fuzzy tufts for a touch of texture. Designed with attached handles for easy portability, this round basket is great for stowing toys, blankets, diapers, baby clothes and more, and it's easy to spot clean.

cloud island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
